name: slice_gap_sheared
description: Slice tool Split+Caps+Gap on a SHEARED (non-axis-aligned) cube (mesh.sliceTool, task 0291 two-real-cut fix). The sheared cube's top face is displaced +X so the plane-crossed edges (top/bottom face edges 0-3, 1-2, 5-6, 4-7) are OBLIQUE to the cut-plane normal. Line in xy (-0.285,-0.168)->(0.969,0.225) extruded along Z (axis=z), infinite ON (whole-mesh cut), split ON + caps ON + gap 0.175 center. Task 0291 routes the unrestricted split+gap through TWO REAL parallel plane cuts at center +/- offset*n (offset=0.0875) instead of the task-0290 fixed along-edge slide (which overshoots at a graze vertex on dense/curved cuts): each of the 4 crossed edges now yields TWO seam verts, one per offset plane, placed at the exact edge INTERSECTION with that plane (edge ∩ plane), not a fixed slide distance along the edge. Counts are unchanged (16v/24e/12f) because the two-cut + band-delete model reproduces the SAME vertex SET as the prior slide on this simple (non-sliver) case -- only the seam VALUES move to the exact edge-plane intersection. PROOF: for each original crossed edge A-B, the seam sits at A + t*(B-A) where t solves dot(n, A + t*(B-A) - p) = +/-offset; the source/mesh.d cutByPlaneSplitGap kernel unittests assert the general two-cut composition (axis-cube) and the sliver-immune curved case separately -- here the frozen post-op vertices pin this fixture's exact re-derived geometry.
source: Analytic re-derivation (task 0291): seam = edge ∩ (center +/- offset*n) plane, solved directly per crossed edge (t = (offset - dot(n,A-p)) / dot(n,B-A), seam = A + t*(B-A)), NOT by blessing vibe3d's own output. Plane normal n = normalize(cross(end-start, +Z)) and point p = start, matching planeForSlice/cutByPlaneSplitGap exactly. Confirmed each computed point is ON its source edge (cross(seam-A, B-A) ~ 0) and ON its offset plane (dot(n, seam-p) == +/-0.0875) before freezing. This is the reference model per MODO's own knife split+caps+gap capture (toolcards/poly.knife/capture/subdiv_gap/ANALYSIS.md): seam vert = edge INTERSECT (center +/- offset*n) plane, two parallel plane cuts, band between them removed.
